title: Los hijos de la noche
writer: Leandro Navarro, Adolfo Torrado, Benito Perojo
actors: Estrellita Castro, Julio Peña, Alberto Romea
plot: Three poor but good-natured gypsies find their way to a temporarily better life when a millionaire engages them on Christmas Eve to play son, daughter and tutor as his sister from America paying him a visit expects to find a famil...
